name: Helpjuice Knowledge Base API
what_it_does: Helpjuice customer-facing knowledge base REST API for support teams to create, manage, and optimize self-service help centers with AI-powered search, analytics, and multi-language support. Enables AI agents to manage article creation and category organization for knowledge base content automation, handle AI-powered search and article surfacing for customer self-service automation, access article analytics and search analytics for knowledge gap identification automation, retrieve multi-language article translation management for global support automation, manage customer feedback and article rating for content quality automation, handle article version history and draft management for content lifecycle automation, access custom domain and branding configuration for white-label help center automation, retrieve Google Analytics integration for support deflection measurement automation, manage team collaboration and article review workflow for content governance automation, and integrate Helpjuice with Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk, and CRM platforms for end-to-end self-service support workflow.
use_cases: Creating help articles from support deflection automation agents
Analyzing search queries from knowledge gap identification agents
Managing multi-language content from global support agents
Measuring self-service from support analytics agents
not_for: Internal team knowledge base (use Guru or Slab for internal knowledge)
Community forum and user-generated content (use Discourse or Khoros)
Live chat and ticketing (use Zendesk or Intercom)
best_when: A support team wanting AI agents to automate customer-facing knowledge base management, AI search optimization, content analytics, and multi-language article management through Helpjuice's dedicated help center platform.
avoid_when: AI SEARCH QUALITY DEPENDS ON ARTICLE DEPTH AND COVERAGE: Helpjuice's AI-powered search quality is proportional to knowledge base content depth; automated self-service workflows relying on AI search for new or thinly-documented product areas return poor results; knowledge base content investment required before AI search deflection automation delivers measurable support ticket reduction. ANALYTICS ATTRIBUTION FOR DEFLECTION MEASUREMENT: Helpjuice search analytics shows what customers searched for and read, but ticket deflection attribution (did the article prevent a ticket?) requires integration with support platform; automated deflection reporting must correlate Helpjuice analytics with support ticket data for accurate ROI measurement. CUSTOM DOMAIN CONFIGURATION NOT AUTOMATABLE VIA API: Helpjuice custom domain and SSL configuration is performed via support request, not API; automated multi-tenant knowledge base deployment cannot programmatically configure custom domains; custom domain setup requires manual Helpjuice support intervention.

auth.notes: Helpjuice uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Founded 2012 by Emil Hajric. Bootstrapped, profitable. Products: AI-powered knowledge base, search analytics, multi-language, Google Analytics integration, custom domain. Integrations: Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk, Salesforce, Slack. GDPR. Serves SMB to enterprise support teams. Competes with Document360, Confluence, and Zendesk Guide for customer-facing knowledge base.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($120/mo, 4 users), Run ($200/mo, 16 users), Premium ($289/mo, unlimited users), Enterprise (custom)
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. Bootstrapped. Per-plan subscription (not per-user on lower tiers). 14-day trial. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; article and search queries throttled; no webhooks — polling for content changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING FOR CONTENT CHANGES: Helpjuice has no webhook support; automated content sync workflows (mirroring Helpjuice articles to other platforms) must poll article list with updated timestamp filter; polling frequency must balance freshness against API rate limits for large knowledge bases

ARTICLE CATEGORY NESTING LIMIT: Helpjuice category structure has limited nesting depth; automated knowledge base migration from deeply nested structures must flatten category hierarchy to Helpjuice's supported depth; automated category creation beyond nesting limit creates placement error

SEARCH ANALYTICS API vs ARTICLE ANALYTICS: Helpjuice provides separate API endpoints for article view analytics and search query analytics; automated knowledge gap analysis requires both endpoints — article analytics (what's read) and search analytics (what's searched but not found); automated analysis using only one dataset creates incomplete gap identification

MULTI-LANGUAGE ARTICLE TRANSLATION API WORKFLOW: Helpjuice multi-language articles require creating separate article version per language; automated translation workflow must create base article, then create translated versions linked to base; automated translation that creates independent articles (not linked translations) creates disconnected multilingual content without language switcher integration

GOOGLE ANALYTICS INTEGRATION FOR DEFLECTION MEASUREMENT: Helpjuice's Google Analytics integration is configured via dashboard, not API; automated deflection measurement analytics require pre-configured GA4 integration; automated support analytics workflows must establish GA4 connection manually before automated deflection KPI extraction via GA4 API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Knowledge base. GDPR. API key. US. Customer-facing help content and search analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Help center. GDPR. API key. US. Knowledge base content and analytics data.
